name: agentgram
description: Codex and AI-agent Telegram messaging and file-sending plugin with a local CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Send Telegram messages and files from Codex and agent sessions.
interface.longDescription: Agentgram is a Codex Telegram plugin and local CLI for AI agents. It sends explicit, user-requested Telegram messages and files through the Telegram Bot API using a bot token and chat id from the user's environment.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentgram to send a Telegram message or file.
